title: QuestCrate
description: A Create Modpack For QuestCraft. Archived due to issues with loading on QuestCraft. Still works standalone with ViveCraft.
body:
## 🧰 QuestCrate


## NOTE: QUESTCRATE IS TOO HEAVY FOR QUESTCRAFT - That is why it is archived

**QuestCrate** is a **performance-optimized Create modpack for QuestCraft VR**, designed to deliver the *smoothest, most immersive Create experience possible* on your headset.  
Even if you’re not using QuestCraft, QuestCrate works great as a lightweight Create pack for meta quest/PC players who want stability and speed.

---

### 🚀 What It Does

QuestCrate focuses on **making the Create mod run flawlessly in VR** by combining powerful optimization mods with the full Create ecosystem.  
Unlike simply installing Create on QuestCraft, this pack is tuned for **high performance and optimisation**.

Included optimizations:
- ⚙️ **Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Indium, Krypton, MoreCulling, Dynamic FPS, ThreadTweak, and GPUBooster** – improve FPS, chunk loading, and performance in VR.  
- 🧩 **Vivecraft, MC VR API, and ViveCraft Compat** – enable full VR support and smoother head tracking.  
- 🗺️ **ServerCore, Packet Fixer, and Fast IP Ping** – better multiplayer stability and lower latency.  
- 🌄 **Iris + BSL / Complementary Shaders** – adds beautiful, optimized visuals that run well in VR.  

---

### 🛠️ Included Create Add-ons

QuestCrate also comes pre-bundled with popular Create extensions, including:
- **Create Jetpack**
- **Create Deco**
- **Create: Steam 'n' Rails**
- **Create: Enchantment Industry**
- **Create Big Cannons**
- **Create: Dreams & Desires**
- **Create: New Age**
- **Create: Copycats+**
- **Create: Power Loader**
- **Create: Structures**
- **Create Ore Excavation**
- **Create Crafts & Additions**

All of these are pre-configured to work together smoothly in VR environments.

---

### 🌐 Singleplayer & Multiplayer

If you have trouble creating a singleplayer world in QuestCraft:
- You can easily host your own world using **Aternos** (free) or any other server provider — just upload the modpack.  
- **e4mc** is included to make it easy to connect to LAN or hosted worlds.

---

### 📦 Version Compatibility

Currently, QuestCrate runs on **Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric)** — the latest version supported by Create.  
Create (Fabric) has not yet been ported to 1.21+, so upgrading is not currently possible without backports.

---

### 💡 Why Use QuestCrate?

- Stable FPS and fewer crashes on QuestCraft  
- Pre-configured Create add-ons for the full automation experience  
- Works for both **VR** and **non-VR** users  
- Easy multiplayer setup out of the box  

Yes, the logo is AI, I am currently working on an actual logo. It is currently just a placeholder.

### PLEASE NOTE: IT IS HIGHLY ADVISED TO USE THIS MODPACK ON PC. LOADING TIMES CAN BE UP TO AN HOUR ON QUEST (When tested on Quest 2)
